task_completion.description: The agent selected the 'Opportunities' module for the new report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field in the report creation interface showing 'Opportunities' as the selected module.

task_completion.description: The agent entered 'Weekly Pipeline by Stage' as the report name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the report name containing exactly 'Weekly Pipeline by Stage'.

task_completion.description: The agent added the required fields to the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report builder's fields/columns section shows 'Opportunity Name', 'Amount', and 'Sales Stage' added to the report.

task_completion.description: The agent grouped the report by 'Sales Stage'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report builder's grouping or summary section shows 'Sales Stage' selected as a group-by parameter.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the report and the final report is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final saved report page is visible, displaying the title 'Weekly Pipeline by Stage' and showing data grouped by Sales Stage.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not a text editor or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQL scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL INSERT commands or database scripts to create the report.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely used the report builder interface rather than modifying the DOM to fake a completed report.
integrity.visual_evidence: A logical progression of screenshots showing the report creation form being filled out step-by-step before the final report is shown.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report name is exactly 'Weekly Pipeline by Stage'. The report must be created for the 'Opportunities' module. To be considered correct, the report must contain at least 2 of the requested fields (Opportunity Name, Amount, Sales Stage) and at least 1 grouping (Sales Stage).
